description:
Allow balls to function entirely without a git repository when using --tasks-dir.

Changes:
- Store gets no_git: bool field (implies stealth)
- bl init --tasks-dir /path works outside git (skip git_root, state branch, commit)
- Store::discover walks up dirs for .balls/config.json when not in git
- bl claim --no-worktree: status flip only, no git worktree. Required in no-git mode.
- bl review/close auto-detect no-git: status flips + file delete, no merge
- bl drop in no-git: status reset only
- bl sync in no-git: plugin sync only, skip git fetch/push
- Guards on ready auto-fetch, repair worktree cleanup
- Extract commit_init to store_init.rs to keep store.rs under 300 lines
- Fix stealth close_and_archive skipping parent bookkeeping
- New tests/no_git.rs integration suite
- Update README, SKILL.md
title: No-git mode: bl works without a git repo via --tasks-dir + --no-worktree
